description: §20.8.1 — the `class` / `id` attributes registered for `<outlet>` (attribute-registry.js) survive to the emitted region `<div>`. The region carries both the author `class`/`id` AND the `data-scrml-outlet` marker. (Regression: the Wave-1a outlet emit hardcoded `<div data-scrml-outlet>` and dropped class/id.)
rationale: §20.8.1: the outlet is a real addressable region; its presentation attrs (class/id) are author-owned and must be emitted onto the region element.
